summary: Renter Profile Phase 2 testing complete. Fixed critical bug in application status parsing. All core features working: Profile page with user info, profile completion progress, partner application form, application status display, telegram connection, quick actions.

integration_issues.issue: PARTNER users cannot access /renter/profile due to layout allowedRoles restriction, so Welcome modal never shows
integration_issues.recommendation: Move Welcome Partner modal logic to /partner/dashboard or add PARTNER to renter layout allowedRoles

action_items: Move Welcome Partner celebration modal to Partner Dashboard (currently unreachable because PARTNER users blocked by renter layout)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Application status API response parsing - profile page was checking data.data but API returns data directly (status, hasApplication)
VERIFIED: Partner application creates PENDING status, does NOT auto-change user role
VERIFIED: Telegram notification sent to admin group after application submission
VERIFIED: Application status displays correctly (Pending/Rejected/Approved with appropriate messages)
VERIFIED: Profile completion percentage calculated dynamically (55% for user without phone/telegram)
VERIFIED: 3 partner benefits displayed (0% Commission, 24/7 Support, Fast Payouts)
VERIFIED: Quick Actions grid has 4 buttons (My Bookings, Favorites, Settings, Logout)
ISSUE: Welcome Partner modal logic in /renter/profile/page.js but PARTNER role blocked by layout
updated_files: /app/app/renter/profile/page.js - Fixed fetchApplicationStatus() to properly parse API response

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All features work except Welcome Partner modal unreachable

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test users. Pavel user has REJECTED application (admin rejected with reason 'Не видно фото')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile page fully functional. Application status API fixed. Pavel user has REJECTED application - can test Reapply flow. Welcome Partner modal needs to be moved to partner dashboard as PARTNER users cannot access renter layout.

verified_features.profile_page_loads: PASS - Profile page loads with user info, avatar, name, email, RENTER badge
verified_features.profile_completion_progress: PASS - Shows 55% with progress bar, 'Complete your profile' message
verified_features.become_partner_card: PASS - Shows for non-partners with 3 benefits (0% Commission, 24/7 Support, Fast Payouts)
verified_features.partner_application_modal: PASS - Opens with form fields (Phone*, Experience*, Social, Portfolio)
verified_features.application_submission_api: PASS - Creates PENDING application, sends Telegram to admin
verified_features.application_status_display: PASS - Shows Application Declined with rejection reason + Reapply button
verified_features.no_auto_role_change: PASS - User role remains RENTER after application submission
verified_features.telegram_connection: PASS - Generates link code, shows Copy button and 'Open Telegram Bot'
verified_features.quick_actions: PASS - 4 buttons: My Bookings, Favorites, Settings, Logout
verified_features.welcome_partner_modal: PARTIAL - Code exists but unreachable (PARTNER blocked by layout)
verified_features.auth_protection: PASS - Shows 'Требуется авторизация' when not logged in

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: fetchApplicationStatus() checking data.data but API returns hasApplication/status at root level
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed to check data.hasApplication and map fields correctly

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Application status not displaying on profile page
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Mismatch between API response format and frontend parsing - API returns {success, hasApplication, status, rejectionReason} but frontend was checking for data.data
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Updated fetchApplicationStatus() to properly parse the API response structure
reproduction_steps: 1. Login as renter user with existing application
3. Application status section should show current status
